title: Draft revision options for highest-priority chain gaps
description: Turn the highest-priority therefore/but findings into concrete revision options without overwriting canon.
acceptance_criteria: Address the highest-priority broken or weak chain links from TASK-002
Give at least two concrete revision options for each selected gap
Explain tradeoffs for Elizabeth's agency, Pathwell's motive, Shade's motive, and escalation
Do not overwrite canon; mark proposals as proposals
